elements.name: Login, add items to cart, and logout successfully

steps.name: the user is on the SauceDemo login page
the user logs in with username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce"
the user should be redirected to the products page
the user adds the following items to the cart:
the cart badge should show "2" items
the user opens the cart page

the user should be redirected to the login page

name: SauceDemo Login, Add to Cart, and Logout
description:
As a registered user of SauceDemo
  I want to log in, add items to my cart, and log out
  So that I can verify the core shopping flow works correctly
